zh.lifeSummary: 當Donald - Dhu Cameron 11th of Clan Cameron於大約1410年出生在蘇格蘭音巴內-爾時，他的父親Allan MacOcherty Cameron 9th Chief of Clan Cameron21歲，母親Isabel Drummond21歲。他於1423年與Marjorie Anne MacMartin在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1460年在英國蘇格蘭音巴內-爾享年51歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭音巴內-爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Donald - Dhu Cameron 11th of Clan Cameron于大约1410年出生在苏格兰音巴內-爾时，他的父亲Allan MacOcherty Cameron 9th Chief of Clan Cameron21岁，母亲Isabel Drummond21岁。他于1423年与Marjorie Anne MacMartin在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1460年在英国苏格兰音巴內-爾享年51岁，埋葬在苏格兰音巴內-爾。

nameMeanings.name: Cameron
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: in the Highlands, it is usually a nickname from Gaelic cam ‘crooked, bent’ + sròn ‘nose’.
in the Lowlands it is also a habitational name from any of various places called Cameron, especially in Fife.

variants.name: Cambron
meanings: Spanish (Cambrón): habitational name from any of several places in the provinces of Cáceres and Murcia called Cambrón.
French: habitational name from any of the places in Somme and Aisne called Cambron. Alternatively, from a diminutive of c(h)ambre ‘room’ (see Cambre ).

nameMeanings.name: Donald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of Gaelic Domhnall . The final -d of the Anglicized form derives partly from misinterpretation by English speakers of the Gaelic pronunciation, and partly from association with Germanic-origin names such as Ronald . This name is strongly associated with clan Macdonald, the clan of the medieval Lords of the Isles, but is now also widely used by families with no Scottish connections.

nameMeanings.name: Dhu
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Donald - Dhu Cameron 11th of Clan Cameron was born about 1410, in Inverness-shire, Scotland, his father, Allan MacOcherty Cameron 9th Chief of Clan Cameron, was 21 and his mother, Isabel Drummond, was 21. He married Marjorie Anne MacMartin in 1423, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. He died in 1460, in Inverness-shire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 51, and was buried in Inverness-shire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Donald - Dhu Cameron 11th of Clan Cameron est né environ 1410, à Inverness-shire, Écosse, son père, Allan MacOcherty Cameron 9th Chief of Clan Cameron, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Isabel Drummond, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Marjorie Anne MacMartin en 1423, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé en 1460, à Inverness-shire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterré à Inverness-shire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Donald - Dhu Cameron 11th of Clan Cameron um 1410 in Inverness-shire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Allan MacOcherty Cameron 9th Chief of Clan Cameron 21 und seine Mutter Isabel Drummond 21. Er hat 1423 in Scotland Marjorie Anne MacMartin geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb 1460 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Inverness-shire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Inverness-shire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Donald - Dhu Cameron 11th of Clan Cameron è nato il circa 1410 nel Inverness-shire, Scotland, il suo padre, Allan MacOcherty Cameron 9th Chief of Clan Cameron, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Isabel Drummond, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Marjorie Anne MacMartin nel 1423, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1460, nel Inverness-shire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolto a Inverness-shire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Donald - Dhu Cameron 11th of Clan Cameronが約1410年にスコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアで生まれた時，父Allan MacOcherty Cameron 9th Chief of Clan Cameronは21歳，母Isabel Drummondは21歳であった。1423年にスコットランドでMarjorie Anne MacMartinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1460年にイギリススコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアで51歳で死去し，スコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Donald - Dhu Cameron 11th of Clan Cameron(이)가 대략 1410년 스컷랜드 인버네스-실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Allan MacOcherty Cameron 9th Chief of Clan Cameron(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel Drummond(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1423년 스컷랜드에서 Marjorie Anne MacMartin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1460년 영국 스코틀랜드 인버네스-실르에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 인버네스-실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Donald - Dhu Cameron 11th of Clan Cameron nasceu aproximadamente 1410, em Inverness-shire, Scotland, seu pai, Allan MacOcherty Cameron 9th Chief of Clan Cameron, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Drummond, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Marjorie Anne MacMartin em 1423, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1460, em Inverness-shire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 51 anos, e foi sepultado em Inverness-shire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Donald - Dhu Cameron 11th of Clan Cameron родился около 1410 г. в местности инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Allan MacOcherty Cameron 9th Chief of Clan Cameron было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Isabel Drummond, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Marjorie Anne MacMartin в 1423 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер в 1460 г. в местности инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 51 год и был похоронен в местности инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Donald - Dhu Cameron 11th of Clan Cameron nació aproximadamente 1410, en Inverness-shire, Scotland, su papá, Allan MacOcherty Cameron 9th Chief of Clan Cameron, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Isabel Drummond, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Marjorie Anne MacMartin en 1423, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1460, en Inverness-shire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultado en Inverness-shire, Scotland.
